devops_deploy: aws ecr get-login-password --region us-west-2 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 123456789.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
kubectl get pods -n staging -l app=alignlayer-api -o wide
aws ecr describe-images --repository-name alignlayer --region us-west-2 | jq '.imageDetails[0].imageTags'
kubectl exec -it $(kubectl get pod -n staging -l app=alignlayer-api -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}') -n staging -- curl localhost:8080/health
aws ecr batch-delete-image --repository-name alignlayer --region us-west-2 --image-ids imageTag=staging
data_pipeline: psql -h prod-db.internal -U etl_user -d analytics -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day';"

psql -h prod-db.internal -U etl_user -d analytics -c "\COPY (SELECT id, user_id, amount, timestamp FROM transactions WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') TO '/tmp/transactions.csv' WITH CSV HEADER;"
python3 -m pip install --upgrade pandas pyarrow boto3 sqlalchemy
python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_parquet('/tmp/transactions.parquet'); print(f'Rows: {len(df)}, Cols: {len(df.columns)}')"
psql -h prod-db.internal -U etl_user -d analytics -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';"
psql -h prod-db.internal -U etl_user -d analytics -t -c "SELECT MAX(id) FROM transactions;" | xargs -I {} echo "Last transaction ID: {}"
psql -h prod-db.internal -U etl_user -d analytics -c "CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_txn AS SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tmp_txn;"
aws s3api head-bucket --bucket analytics-lake && echo 'Bucket exists' || echo 'Bucket not found'
security_audit: grep -r 'BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY\|BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY' --include='*.pem' --include='*.key' .
aws iam get-user-policy --user-name admin --policy-name '*' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Policy not found'
cat /proc/net/tcp | awk '{print $2}' | grep -v local_address | cut -d: -f2 | sort -u
db_migration: pg_dump -U postgres -h localhost mydb --format=custom --file=/backups/mydb_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).dump
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "CREATE TABLE users_new (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW())"

psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "CREATE TABLE orders_new (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users_new(id), amount DECIMAL(10,2), status VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW())"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "INSERT INTO users_new (username, email) SELECT username, email FROM users WHERE archived = false"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "INSERT INTO orders_new (user_id, amount, status) SELECT user_id, total_amount, order_status FROM orders WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01'"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "ALTER TABLE orders_new ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user_valid FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users_new(id) ON DELETE CASCADE"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users_new(email)"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_id ON orders_new(user_id)"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_created ON orders_new(created_at DESC)"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "GRANT SELECT ON users_new TO readonly_user"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON orders_new TO app_user"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "GRANT USAGE ON SEQUENCE users_new_id_seq TO app_user"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as user_count FROM users_new"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders_new"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "SELECT u.id, COUNT(o.id) as order_cnt FROM users_new u LEFT JOIN orders_new o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "SELECT SUM(amount) as total_revenue FROM orders_new WHERE status = 'completed'"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "ALTER TABLE users_new ADD COLUMN phone_number VARCHAR(20)"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "ANALYZE users_new; ANALYZE orders_new"
psql -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users CASCADE; ALTER TABLE users_new RENAME TO users"
pg_restore -U postgres -h localhost -d mydb --format=custom --clean /backups/mydb_20240315_143022.dump 2>&1 | tee /var/log/pg_restore_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log
incident_response: ssh prod-db-01.internal 'psql -U dbuser -d maindb -c "SELECT count(*) FROM users;"'
ssh prod-cache-01.internal 'redis-cli info memory | grep used_memory_human'
